title: Inflation likely to stay ‘significantly above target,’ top European central banker warns
summary_full: Joachim Nagel, president of Germany’s Bundesbank, spoke to CNBC on the sidelines of an ECB conference in Portugal.
summary_public: Joachim Nagel, president of Germany’s Bundesbank, spoke to CNBC on the sidelines of an ECB conference in Portugal.
